title: Superposition
description: A simple, configurable, all-in-one waypoint, home, spawn, tpa, back commands mod.
body:
# Superposition
An all-in-one waypoint, home, spawn, tpa, back commands mod.

This mod was made because my friend challenged me to mod development, so I made it and enjoyed the process.

Must be installed on Server and Client.

Config is located in `/config/spos-common.toml` and stored data is in `/config/spos` folder.

If there's any errors executing the commands, delete the `/config/spos` folder and restart the server.
